description_long: This is a cylindrical, red metallic barrel with a distressed, scratched surface, giving it a weathered and used appearance. The barrel features two prominent horizontal reinforcement bands, one near the top and one near the bottom, adding structural integrity. On one side, there is a yellow triangular warning label with a black biohazard symbol, indicating hazardous or toxic contents. Green, glowing streaks resembling chemical spills or residue are visible on one side, suggesting recent leakage or contamination. The top of the barrel is open, revealing a hollow interior, and there are no visible handles or lids. The overall look suggests it is used for storing or disposing of dangerous materials in an industrial or urban environment.
description: A weathered red metal barrel with a biohazard warning label and green chemical stains, open at the top and reinforced with horizontal bands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the biohazard warning label and green chemical stains on the lower right side.
description_view_1: Side view with green chemical stains visible, but the warning label is not in sight.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, scratched red metal surface with no labels or stains.
description_view_3: Side view with only a small portion of the warning label visible on the right edge, mostly showing the distressed red surface.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal reinforcement bands at top and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: yellow biohazard warning label, green chemical stains
